regime_scorecard.summary: regime_id is null for all 3496 rows in the MEXC dataset. No regime scorecard can be produced until regime assignment is available.

scenario_results.notes: python -m services.validation.strategy_replay_runner --dataset-source file --input-candles artifacts/candles/mexc_strict_window_3091/candles.jsonl --strategy-id primary_breakout_v1 --symbol BTCUSDT --adapter-id primary_breakout_runner_v1 --dry-run: PASS (config valid, dataset loaded, candles_total=3496).

Full replay fails with 'ERROR: failed to derive execution provenance id: missing required field: regime_id'. The historical bridge (build_primary_breakout_historical_bridge) requires integer regime_id per row; 3496 of 3496 rows have regime_id=null.

limitations: All financial metrics are zero because no backtest execution was possible. The dataset lacks regime assignment (regime_id is null).
Dataset provenance is validated (SHA-256, venue=mexc, venue_match=true, 0 gaps, strict_campaign_grade), but this alone is insufficient for profitability evidence.

This packet serves as a seed artifact: it demonstrates that the evidence pipeline can be constructed end-to-end (dataset -> quality report -> candidate -> evidence packet) but is blocked at the backtest execution stage by the regime_id gap.
Once a regime assignment bridge or pre-computed regime labels are available for this dataset, the packet can be updated with actual backtest metrics.
safety_boundaries: LR remains NO-GO. This packet does not constitute any form of live trading approval.
Board 'trade-capable' stage does not authorize live capital or strategy promotion.
All zero-value financial metrics are explicitly placeholder values due to blocked execution; they are not claims of zero profitability or zero risk.
No automatic promotion to BACKTESTED, ARVP_VALIDATED, or any downstream gate is authorized by this packet.
Dataset evidence class is controlled_lab_evidence, not natural_paper_evidence.
